channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: This is the Microsoft Surface Laptop Ultra with Nvidia RTX Spark
item.description: Once upon a time, Microsoft had to write off $900 million betting an Arm-based Nvidia chip could power its first flagship Windows portable, the original Microsoft Surface. But today, it's trying again. Microsoft and Nvidia have just announced the Surface Laptop Ultra, a computer with a new Arm-based Nvidia chip at its core. There's a […]

item.title: AMD ressuscite le 5800X3D et lance le 7700X3D et la RX 9070 GRE
item.description: AMD ressort un processeur vieux de quatre ans et le vend presque au prix du neuf. Derrière ce choix bizarre se cache un marché de la mémoire devenu fou.

item.title: Nvidia announces RTX Spark as ‘the most efficient PC chip ever built’
item.description: This fall, Nvidia will officially become a consumer PC chipmaker like Intel, AMD, Apple, and Qualcomm, putting a complete computing chip - not just graphics - into the very heart of laptops and mini-PCs. After many months of leaks, it's finally announcing the RTX Spark, the first in a family of chips that will meet […]

item.title: There are no strangers at my front door — but Ring's Familiar Faces feature would be better if it weren't tied to its Pro tier
item.description: Ring's Familiar Faces beta can identify and track unfamilar faces at your doorstep, but you will have to pay for it.

item.title: Colour me thrilled — the Kindle Colorsoft has dropped below the AU$300 mark for Amazon's Mid-Year Sale
item.description: Just AU$5 more than its all-time low price and now matching the Paperwhite's RRP, the Kindle Colorsoft is definitely worth it for AU$299 and arguably better value than the 6-inch Kobo Clara Colour.

item.title: MSI Claw 8 EX AI+ with Intel Arc G3 Extreme inside revealed at Computex 2026
item.description: The MSI Claw 8 EX AI+ has been announced at Computex 2026 to take on the Steam Deck.
